news.headline: Top forecasters anticipate Adobe's Q1 earnings with $4.97 EPS and $5.66B revenue projections. Stock closed at $433.66.
news.summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is set to announce its first-quarter financial results after the market closes on March 12. Analysts are predicting earnings of $4.97 per share, up from $4.48 per share compared to the previous year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $5.66 billion, surpassing the $5.18 billion recorded a year ago. Adobe recently reported fourth-quarter revenue of $5.61 billion on December 11, 2024, beating the estimated $5.54 billion. On Tuesday, Adobe shares closed at $433.66, experiencing a 0.3% decline. For more detailed analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can filter information by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, or rating change.

news.headline: Enlighted introduces Enlighted Eazy - smart lighting system for SMBs with laser-based commissioning, 30% faster deployment.
news.summary: FREMONT, California - Siemens-owned property technology company, Enlighted, introduced Enlighted Eazy, a new smart lighting control solution tailored for small and medium-sized businesses (SMB) market. The product provides quick, user-friendly app-based setup at an affordable cost. As the sole lighting control system with laser-based commissioning available, Enlighted Eazy speeds up deployment by up to 30% compared to conventional Bluetooth methods. This innovative solution aims to enhance efficiency and accessibility in the SMB sector.

news.headline: Hightouch appoints Lindsay McEwan as EMEA General Manager to expand across Europe, driving business growth.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Hightouch, a prominent Composable CDP and AI Decisioning firm, named Lindsay McEwan as the General Manager for the EMEA region. In this capacity, McEwan will spearhead Hightouch's growth throughout Europe, aiding companies in realizing their full potential.

news.headline: Physician Growth Partners advises Charlotte Dermatology in its 18th dermatology group transaction, solidifying its role as a top advisor for independents in private equity and strategic partnerships.
news.summary: This recent transaction represents the 18th dermatology group that PGP has advised since 2018, spanning across 11 states. This solidifies PGP's position as a prominent advisor and supporter of independent dermatologists seeking private equity and strategic partnerships. The transaction took place in Chicago on March 12, 2025, further demonstrating PGP's expertise in this sector.

news.headline: U.S. inflation improves with consumer prices up 2.8% in Feb, exceeding expectations. Worries persist over tariffs impact.
news.summary: In the twelve months leading up to February, consumer prices increased by 2.8%, which was a slightly more favorable outcome than anticipated by economists. However, there are concerns among analysts that tariffs may contribute to inflationary pressures.

news.headline: Children's Hospital Colorado opens in-house whole-genome sequencing lab to improve patient outcomes. - March 12, 2025.
news.summary: The Precision Medicine Institute at Children's Hospital Colorado in Aurora, disclosed today the launch of its state-of-the-art whole-genome technology platform. By utilizing dynamic genomic tools, the institute aims to enhance patient results. This comes as a significant step forward in improving medical care standards. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Fractional COO Solutions by LeNae Goolsby aims to boost efficiency for SMBs; launched on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Today in New Orleans, on March 12, 2025, a new service called Fractional COO Services was launched to assist small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs). This service is spearheaded by operational efficiency expert LeNae Goolsby and aims to be a game-changing solution for businesses. It is designed to help SMBs convert chaos into profit by providing expert guidance. This service offers a unique approach to operational efficiency and stands out in the market as a valuable ally for SMBs looking to improve their performance.[Approximate characters: 444]

news.headline: TaxClosure.org and Movo.cash form alliance to provide exclusive IRS tax debt resolution deal to over one million MOVO subscribers.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, TaxClosure.org, a prominent tax debt resolution platform, unveiled a fresh marketing collaboration with Movo.cash, a mobile banking innovator. This alliance is set to target more than one million MOVO subscribers, including numerous individuals employed by...

news.headline: March is LFS Awareness Month, jscreen highlights importance of genetic testing with 7-time cancer survivor Lainie Jones.
news.summary: In March 12, 2025, in Atlanta, jscreen®, a national nonprofit public health initiative, highlighted the significance of genetic testing during Li-Fraumeni Syndrome (LFS) Awareness Month. This initiative was championed by Seven-Time Cancer Survivor Lainie Jones, emphasizing the life-saving impact of genetic testing. LFS is a hereditary cancer predisposition syndrome and raising awareness about it is crucial. Jscreen is actively promoting the importance of genetic testing, especially considering that individuals with LFS have a 90% risk of developing cancer within their lifetime. This initiative aims to educate the public about the benefits of genetic testing in potentially detecting and preventing cancer earlier.

news.headline: SDM acquires 5 dental practices across 3 states, expanding network. #DentalManagement #Expansion
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, on March 12, 2025, Straine Dental Management (SDM), a leading dentist-owned and dentist-led dental services organization (DSO), has achieved a noteworthy milestone by acquiring five exceptional dental practices in Texas.

news.headline: OsteoStrong hosts webinar on GLP-1's impact on bone health and osteoporosis research. CEO and engineer to discuss findings.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee, OsteoStrong, a prominent figure in osteogenic loading technology, will host a live webinar. The event will showcase CEO Kyle Zagrodzky and biomedical engineer Dr. John Jaquish. The focus will be on recently published research regarding osteoporosis and its side effects. This webinar seeks to shed light on crucial findings in the field.

news.headline: AGM schedule confirmed, to be held on June 15th with a total of 500 attendees. Key topics to be discussed.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.5% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Advanced economies are expected to grow by 5.4% this year, while emerging market and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 6%. Inflation rates are predicted to rise to an average of 3.6% in advanced economies and 5.7% in emerging markets. The report also highlighted that global trade volumes are estimated to increase by 8.4% in 2021. Additionally, total global debt surged to a record high of $289 trillion in the first quarter of 2021, representing 355% of global GDP. Despite the optimistic growth outlook, uncertainties remain due to evolving pandemic situations and varying vaccination rates across countries.

news.headline: Asia-Pacific digital soil mapping market valued at $64.5M in 2024, expected to reach $295.5M by 2034 with 16.4% CAGR. IoT integration in agriculture driving growth.
news.summary: A report on the Asia-Pacific Digital Soil Mapping Platforms and Applications Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at $64.5 million in 2024 and is projected to reach $295.5 million by 2034, displaying a 16.4% CAGR from 2024 to 2034. The Asia-Pacific region is witnessing substantial growth in this market sector.

news.headline: Rapaport hosts Sixth Trade Mission to Sierra Leone, promoting ethical trade and economic development.
news.summary: An upcoming trade mission to Sierra Leone has been revealed by The Rapaport Group, showcasing its dedication to ethical trade and sustainable economic growth. This will mark the organization's fourth mission to Sierra Leone in the last two years, emphasizing its focus on responsible sourcing and advancement in the artisanal diamond industry. Sierra Leone, previously known for its civil war, is now a symbol of resilience and growth. This mission highlights the commitment to supporting the country's development.

news.headline: Echelon Fitness partners with AWS, introduces AI for personalized workouts. Transforming digital fitness with Amazon's technology.
news.summary: A prominent connected fitness firm is utilizing Amazon Bedrock and OpenSearch to transform digital workout customization. In a recent press release, Echelon, based in CHATTANOOGA, Tenn., disclosed their intention to innovate in the realm of at-home and commercial fitness. This company is known for its cutting-edge technology and has been a frontrunner in the fitness industry. The press release was issued on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Illusionist Rob Lake's 2025 Tour mesmerizes global audiences, with new shows in Dubai and India. Sold-out performances continue.
news.summary: Renowned illusionist Rob Lake is captivating audiences worldwide with his mesmerizing show on the sold-out pre-Broadway 2025 International Tour. The tour follows a successful performance in South Africa last year, attracting crowds in the thousands. With a series of spellbinding acts, Rob Lake has become a must-see sensation, with tickets selling out quickly at each stop on his global tour.

news.headline: Elute receives FDA clearance for synthetic bone void filler kit, customizable granule sizes for patients.
news.summary: A cutting-edge kit system has been developed that allows for the customization of granule sizes based on the specific anatomy of patients in real time. This innovation is set to revolutionize the treatment of bone loss or defects resulting from trauma or infections for a large number of patients in the United States. Elute, Inc., a clinical organization based in Salt Lake City, unveiled this breakthrough on March 12, 2025. This development is expected to benefit thousands of patients by providing tailored treatment solutions to address their individual needs.

news.headline: Pusan National University study reveals nanoplastic toxicity in zebrafish, disrupting red blood cell maturation.
news.summary: Research conducted in Busan, South Korea on March 12, 2025, examines the effects of nanoplastic exposure on red blood cell maturation. It reveals that polystyrene nanoparticles, commonly found in consumer goods, can interfere with the development of red blood cells. This discovery underscores potential dangers to aquatic life. The study emphasizes the importance of recognizing the risks posed by nanoplastics and their impact on organisms.

news.headline: Infotools releases new paper on boosting insights credibility and impact within organizations. Auckland, New Zealand, 03/12/2025.
news.summary: Infotools, a renowned market research analysis and reporting solutions provider, has recently launched a new publication in Auckland, New Zealand on March 12, 2025. This publication delves into strategies for insights teams to boost credibility, address skepticism, and align with business goals to make a significant impact. As a global leader in this field, Infotools aims to equip professionals with valuable techniques to drive success.

news.headline: Brave Healer Productions releases Shaman Heart, Vol. 3 on March 12, 2025 featuring guidance from 26 healers in series.
news.summary: A new book titled "Shaman Heart: We Are the Ones We've Been Waiting For" has been released by Brave Healer Productions in Bethesda, Md. The third volume in the Shaman Heart series, it showcases insights from 26 healers, teachers, and mystics. This release comes on March 12, 2025, marking an important milestone for the company.

news.headline: Agroforestry Group (AFG), a prominent private forestry company, joins Guangzhou Association of Foreign Investment Enterprises (GZAEFI) on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China on March 12, 2025, Agroforestry Group (AFG), a prominent private forestry and agriculture management firm globally, revealed its new membership in the prestigious Guangzhou Association of Foreign Investment Enterprises (GZAEFI).

news.headline: Xavier Creative House wins 2025 EcoVadis Regional Sustainability Leadership Award among top-performing companies globally.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Xavier Creative House (XCH), a women-owned healthcare marketing agency based in Philadelphia, received the 2025 EcoVadis Regional Sustainability Leadership Award (Americas). The award distinguishes XCH as one of the top-performing companies globally in terms of sustainability. This recognition highlights XCH's commitment to eco-friendly practices and its standing as a leader in the healthcare marketing sector.

news.headline: Azitra to present at Microbiome Times Partnering Forum on March 12, 2025. Travis Whitfill, COO, to represent. ($AZTR)
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, a biopharmaceutical company called Azitra, Inc. (NYSE American: AZTR) based in Branford, Connecticut, shared news about their Chief Operating Officer, Travis Whitfill, Ph.D., MPH, presenting at an event. Azitra is a clinical-stage company specializing in creating advanced treatments for precision dermatology. The announcement did not provide specific details about the event itself, but it indicates the company's dedication to advancing innovative therapies in the field.

news.headline: Americase demonstrates Li-Ion battery safety at Data Center World 2025, presenting thermal containment solutions. Event in Texas on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: A prominent manufacturer of protective containers is set to showcase thermal containment advancements, participate in a sustainability discussion, and organize an industry networking gathering in WAXAHACHIE, Texas on March 12, 2025. Americase, known for its innovative solutions, will be located at booth #425 during the event. This company specializes in producing protective containers and is eager to present their latest developments, along with engaging with the sustainability discourse and fostering connections within the industry.

news.headline: ARES Security and ONYX partner to integrate ONYX tech into AVERT C2 for defense, nuclear, security markets. (Characters: 96)
news.summary: A recent collaboration between ARES Security and ONYX will see the integration of ONYX technology into ARES' upcoming AVERT C2 and mission planning platforms, catering to the defense, nuclear, and commercial security sectors. The agreement reached in Vienna, Virginia on March 12, 2025, sets the stage for this technological alliance that aims to enhance security solutions. This partnership is set to impact various markets, with key focuses on defense, nuclear, and commercial security.

news.headline: Tonya Council to open Tonya's Cafe in Chapel Hill, expanding on her cookies and bake shop, offering classic comfort food.
news.summary: A renowned Southern entrepreneur, baker, and community advocate, Tonya Council, has unveiled the launch of Tonya's Cafe in Chapel Hill, North Carolina. The cafe is an expansion of Tonya's Cookies and Bake Shop, offering classic comfort food. This new venture, announced on March 12, 2025, aims to bring Southern-style dishes to the community. With this expansion, Tonya continues to showcase her culinary expertise and commitment to serving delightful food.

news.headline: IFEL hosts 7th annual summit promoting inclusion in entrepreneurship for 98% underserved individuals.
news.summary: An annual summit organized by the Institute for Entrepreneurial Leadership is being held for the seventh consecutive year to promote inclusivity in the entrepreneurial ecosystem. The event, scheduled for March 12, 2025, in Newark, New Jersey, aims to bring together individuals passionate about fostering diversity and equality in entrepreneurship. The Institute for Entrepreneurial Leadership (IFEL) has officially opened registration for the summit, welcoming participants to engage in discussions and collaborate on creating a more inclusive environment for entrepreneurs.

news.headline: A Beep, LLC rebrands as Diga-Talk Solutions after 25 years of service in Joliet, Illinois.
news.summary: In Joliet, Illinois, on March 12, 2025, A Beep, LLC, a company with over 25 years of experience in providing dependable communication solutions, unveiled its rebranding as Diga-Talk Solutions. This change signifies a major milestone for the company as they evolve their business operations.

news.headline: US short-term interest-rate futures pare earlier losses after CPI report, traders still see the Fed resuming rate cuts in June.
BrightSpire Capital, Inc. sets record date for 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on March 24, to be held virtually on May 14, 2025 at 10 am ET.
news.summary: BrightSpire Capital, Inc. (NYSE: BRSP) has revealed that its Board of Directors has designated March 24, 2025, as the record date for the Company's upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. This virtual meeting is scheduled to take place on May 14, 2025, at 10:00 am Eastern Time. Details about accessing the virtual meeting will be provided in the Company’s 2025 proxy statement. BrightSpire Capital, Inc. (NYSE: BRSP) is the company in focus.

news.headline: US consumer prices increased by 0.2% in February, as per CPI report - updates ongoing.
U.S. inflation falls below expectations, providing slight relief for the economy.
New CFO announced by Omnicell, marking an important change for the company.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is expected to grow by 3.2% this year, with some regions experiencing higher growth rates than others. Asia is forecasted to have the fastest growth at 5.2%, while Europe is projected to grow by 2.1%. Additionally, it is estimated that the world GDP will reach $87.3 trillion by the end of the year. The report also indicates that inflation rates are expected to remain stable at around 2.3% globally. Experts believe that factors such as trade tensions and geopolitical issues may impact the economic growth in the coming months. The job market is predicted to see an increase, with approximately 45 million jobs expected to be created worldwide. This data suggests a positive outlook for the global economy in the near future.

news.headline: Causal Labs raises $6M seed funding for AI weather prediction. Plans to develop models and expand team.
news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, Causal Labs, is making headlines as it secures $6 million in seed funding. This funding round is led by Kindred Ventures and also involves contributions from Refactor, BoxGroup, Factorial, Otherwise, Karman Ventures, and several angel investors. Causal Labs specializes in AI technology focusing on physics-based models to tackle large-scale societal issues. With this funding, the company aims to grow its team, enhance its existing model with a focus on safety and transparency features, and kickstart new developments in its field.

news.headline: Sidus Space and Warpspace partner for Joint Venture in advanced optical space communication, NASDAQ: SIDU involved.
news.summary: In Cape Canaveral, Florida, and Azuma City, Japan, Sidus Space (NASDAQ: SIDU) revealed a partnership with Warpspace, a leading Japanese space technology firm. The Memorandum of Understanding sets the stage for a potential Joint Venture between the two companies. This collaboration aims to provide advanced services for satellite communication in real-time at high speeds. Sidus Space is known for its innovative approaches in space missions, while Warpspace specializes in high-speed communication networks. The partnership signifies a significant move towards integrated solutions for the next generation of satellite communication technologies.

news.headline: Data pros warn of potential crises due to lack of data quality in AI projects, as 96% fear repercussions. 81% report significant data issues.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, data integration, quality, analytics, and AI leader Qlik® published findings from a new survey of 500 U.S. professionals involved in AI. The study showed that AI projects face threats due to subpar data quality and unrealistic ROI forecasts. The survey highlighted that 81% of AI experts believe their firms grapple with noteworthy data quality problems, jeopardizing the effectiveness of AI investments. The report underlined the imperative for business leaders to prioritize data quality for successful AI integration.

news.headline: T. Rowe Price Group reports assets under management of $1.63 trillion as of February 28, 2025, with net outflows of $4.7B.
news.summary: In Baltimore on March 12, 2025, T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. disclosed that their assets under management stood at $1.63 trillion by the end of February 28, 2025. The company reported net outflows of $4.7 billion for February 2025. These figures were shared in their recent press release.

news.headline: FairNow partners with Nemko Digital and Zertia to strengthen AI governance for enterprises globally. (Word count: 15)
news.summary: A recent collaboration is boosting AI risk management, compliance, and trust-building globally. FairNow, Inc., a top AI governance platform, has partnered with Nemko Digital and Zertia. This move aims to assist organizations worldwide in improving their operations. The partnership, announced on March 12, 2025, is set to leverage the strengths of FairNow, Nemko Digital, and Zertia to provide comprehensive solutions. The collaboration has the potential to significantly impact enterprises, with key focuses on enhancing AI governance and building trust. The partnership showcases a strategic effort to address challenges in the industry and improve overall compliance. This initiative reflects the growing importance of effective risk management in the ever-evolving landscape of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: CSG Systems Intl. to discuss Q1 2025 earnings on May 7 at 5PM ET with CSG president and CFO. Call 1-888-412-4131, passcode 2327393 for info.
news.summary: CSG, a company listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol CSGS, will be holding a conference call on May 7, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss its first quarter financial performance. The call will include insights from CSG's president and CEO, Brian Shepherd, as well as its CFO, Hai Tran. To join the conference, dial 1-888-412-4131 and enter passcode 2327393. Alternatively, you can participate in the webcast of the earnings call in real-time or access the archive. CSG is a leading provider of solutions in the industry.

news.headline: SVB and Pinegrove Venture Partners partner to extend venture debt to tech and life science companies nationally.
news.summary: A strategic lending partnership between Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) and First Citizens Bank will now offer venture debt to technology and life science firms across the US. The collaboration aims to enhance access to financing for companies in these sectors. This initiative comes into effect on March 12, 2025, with SVB extending its lending reach to a broader national audience. The partnership is expected to bring substantial support and opportunities to technology and life science businesses looking to grow and expand.

news.headline: Redpoint Global named leader in Omdia Universe CDP Report for 2025, highest ranking for vendor execution.
news.summary: In Wellesley, Massachusetts, Redpoint Global has been recognized as a Leader in the Omdia Universe for Customer Data Platforms 2025 report. Omdia, a renowned technology research and analysis firm, awarded Redpoint CDP the top position for vendor execution and rated it in the highest tier across various categories such as technology features, solution breadth, and strategy & innovation. They recommend Redpoint to be included in the shortlist for those seeking a CDP vendor, emphasizing its strong performance.

news.headline: Bloomberg launches Ultrashort TIPS 1-13 Months Index; selected as benchmark for RBIL ETF.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in New York, Bloomberg unveiled the Bloomberg US Ultrashort TIPS 1-13 Months Index as the standard for the F/m Ultrashort Treasury Inflation-Protected Security ETF (RBIL). This move signifies a new milestone in the world of finance, providing a basis for tracking short-term Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities with a duration range of 1-13 months. The index's selection highlights its significance in the market, offering investors a valuable tool for assessing this specific sector.

news.headline: Eco-Growth Strategies, Inc. (OTC PINK: ECGS) to acquire Hawaiian Springs Water Company in Hilo, HI. Merger agreement executed.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Eco-Growth Strategies, Inc. (ticker symbol: ECGS), a prominent bottling company known for purified and spring water products, revealed its acquisition of Hawaiian Springs Water Company (HSW). The agreement involves obtaining all assets of HSW, including the plant located in Honolulu.

news.headline: Ace Endico partners with iFoodDS for food traceability, aiding FSMA 204 compliance. Leading to increased accountability.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on March 12, 2025, Ace Endico, a top specialty foods distributor in the New York Metropolitan Area and New England, disclosed its collaboration with iFoodDS, the primary provider of food traceability software. This partnership will empower Ace Endico to enhance its operations by leveraging cutting-edge technology solutions.

news.headline: Cryoport introduces High-Efficiency 800 C to support fertility clinics, biorepositories, labs. (Number: 800 C)
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on March 12, 2025, Cryoport, Inc. (NASDAQ: CYRX), a prominent provider of supply chain services for the life sciences sector, unveiled the High-Efficiency 800 C by MVE Biological Solutions. This product marks the newest offering in their range.

news.headline: Truist bolsters middle market banking team in New Jersey; hired Gino Di Saverio and 3 more recent additions.
news.summary: In Trenton, New Jersey on March 12, 2025, financial institution Truist revealed the addition of experienced commercial banking executive Gino Di Saverio to spearhead a expanding middle market banking team based in New Jersey, which now comprises a total of three new members. Di Saverio is known for his success in developing new business opportunities and maintaining a strong presence in the market.

news.headline: Immersion Corp reports Q3 fiscal 2025 revenue of $474.8M compared to $9.5M in Q3 fiscal 2023. Business Wire.
news.summary: In Aventura, Florida, Immersion Corporation, a prominent haptics technology provider, has released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025. During this period, the company reported total revenues of $474.8 million for the three months ending on January 31, 2025, marking a significant increase from the $9.5 million recorded in the three months ending on September 30, 2023. The company trades on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol IMMR.

news.headline: Edward Jones launching private client service for high net worth clients w/ new products and services on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: A financial services company based in St. Louis is set to introduce Edward Jones Generations™, a specialized private client services offering tailored for high net worth individuals. This new initiative, launching on March 12, 2025, will bring forth a range of exclusive products and services aimed at catering to the unique needs of affluent clients. This marks an important milestone for Edward Jones as they diversify their offerings to better serve this select clientele segment.

news.headline: Mobile Infrastructure Corp (NYSE: BEEP) to present at Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 19, 2025 at 3:15 pm ET. Stephanie Hogue, President, to lead.
news.summary: Mobile Infrastructure Corporation (NYSE American: BEEP) has revealed that Stephanie Hogue, President of the company, will be participating in the Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 19-20, 2025. The conference will see her presenting at 3:15pm ET on Wednesday, March 19, alongside holding one-on-one investor meetings. Mobile Infrastructure Corporation owns a varied collection of parking assets across the United States. This move is aimed at engaging with investors and showcasing the potential of the company.

news.headline: Minimal impact expected on health and wellness sector from Trump tariffs on imports; TruLife Distribution CEO optimistic.
news.summary: CEO of TruLife Distribution discusses the anticipated limited impact of the Trump administration's tariffs on supplements and related imports. This statement was made in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on March 12, 2025. As President Trump's policies unfolded, one significant development was...
